items.title: Indian team discovers rare ‘bow and arrow’ radio galaxy two billion light years from Earth
items.summary: The RAD-BAARG may be one of the clearest known radio signatures of a giant bow shock generated by a galaxy falling supersonically into a cluster environment, the researchers say

items.title: Ukrainian Charged With Sabotaging Pipelines Between Russia and Germany
items.summary: A man identified only as Serhii K. is accused of overseeing an undersea bombing in 2022 that cut off a key source of Russian gas revenues.

items.title: Omar Abdullah backs call for India-Pak talks, says even RSS favours dialogue
items.summary: Jammu and Kashmir Chief Minister Omar Abdullah advocated for renewed India-Pakistan dialogue, emphasizing it's the sole path to de-escalate tensions. He questioned the criticism...
